title: Nexus
description: Insane performance, quality of life mods and other improvements to make Minecraft even better, without making your Worlds function less like Vanilla
body:
![Information Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7654e94fe4fd5fca385f70b524dc172113c3291.webp)Please note: Nexus is not just an optimiziation modpack, it has really cool features that don't impact the vanilla gameplay like better F3. If you don't care about that, use [Nexus Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nexus-optimized) instead

# What's Nexus?
A Modpack (obviously) but what exactly does it do? If you just want to see what mods this has, check this here:
- [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/lhGA9TYQ) by shedaniel
- [Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/vEC2jm6I) by AxalotL, Alchemy, Bliss, FurryMileon, Grider, jediminer543
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ) by Thosea
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/Q2OqKxDG) by way2muchnoise
- [Better Biome Reblend](https://modrinth.com/mod/Xh8hkQmD) by FionaTheMortal \+ UTMG
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/kqJFAPU9) by Lortseam
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/n6PXGAoM) by TheCSDev
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/8shC1gFX) by cominixo, TreyRuffy
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/89Wsn8GD) by Cael
- [Cloth Config v20](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g) by shedaniel
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/e0M1UDsY) by Rick South
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/VSNURh3q) by RelativityMC, ishland
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/1IjD5062) by PepperCode1
- [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/DOUdJVEm) by isXander
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/ETlrkaYF) by Kir\_Antipov
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) by juliand665, LostLuma
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/BVzZfTc1) by Traben
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) by tr7zw
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) by FabricMC
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ha28R6CL) by FabricMC
- [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/3qsfQtE9) by ramidzkh
- [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/9mtu0sUO) by Fallen\_Breath
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) by malte0811

- [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/hYykXjDp) by fzzyhmstrs
- [Give me a new splash text\!](https://modrinth.com/mod/9tsqKbBI)
- [Hide Experimental Warning](https://modrinth.com/mod/Rm4OOdHd) by Rick South
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) by RK\_01
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U) by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/fQEb0iXm) by tuxed
- [Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/2ecVyZ49) by VidTu
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/uLbm7CG6) by Jerozgen
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) by JellySquid, 2No2Name
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/8qkXwOnk) by JackFred
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/51shyZVL) by FX \- PR0CESS, 1Foxy2
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/qQyHxfxd) by Aizistral
- [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/yM94ont6) by Fourmisain, Fudge, Liach, Madis0, Runemoro, Siuolplex, WuzgXY, the456gamer, wafflecoffee
- [NotEnoughAnimations](https://modrinth.com/mod/MPCX6s5C) by tr7zw
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/JuksLGBQ) by opekope2
- [PacketFixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/c7m1mi73) by TonimatasDEV
- [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/eXts2L7r) by Patbox
- [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/3IuO68q1) by PuzzleMC, Motschen
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy) by FlashyReese

- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) by FlashyReese

- [XXLPackets](https://modrinth.com/mod/SeCuopwJ) by Tfarecnim \(Original Creator\), Lazul1ne
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/w7ThoJFB) by isXander
- [kennytv's epic force close loading screen mod for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/blWBX5n1) by kennytv

A list of all features and mods explained is coming soon, nothing impacts the vanilla gameplay tho :)

# Frequently asked Questions:
> **Q:** Does this Modpack come with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)?                                                     
> **A:** Yes, this uses [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) just like many other Optimization Mods.

> **Q:** What Loader does this Modpack use?                                                                   
> **A:** [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), it should install itself after you downloaded this Modpack.

> **Q:** Where can I report or suggest something?                                                
> **A:** Currently you can do this in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gGrAw5WtNb).
           
> **Q:** Do I need this modpack on my server for it to work?                                                     
> **A:** Nope, you can add this to your server (I think it should work just fine) but you don't need to.

> **Q:** How can I contribute?                                                                             
> **A:** I suggest contributing the Mod Creators instead linked above, they did the most work, but if you want to contribute this Modpack you can do it on our [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/iam_best/membership) or on our [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/iam_best)!

> **Q:** Where can I ask for more help or talk with the Creators?                                                                             
> **A:** You can email me at iam_best_dev@proton.me (ignore the dev, I suck at programming lol) or [join our Discord](https://discord.gg/gGrAw5WtNb) with our awesome Community!
